demo_timestamps.description: Step-by-step guide on creating a digital twin system architecture and setup in Autodesk Tandem for real-time data visualization

themes: AI and IoT in Infrastructure Management

client_mentions.name: Sondotecnica
client_mentions.context: Engineering and technological partner involved in the presentation and implementation of digital twins

ai_technologies.name: YOLO v2
ai_technologies.context: Used for real-time people counting with cameras in the digital twin setup

summary: The session discusses the integration of IoT, APS, and AI to create intelligent digital twins for building operations. Utilizing Autodesk Tandem, the presentation demonstrates configuring a digital twin to visualize real-time data and send notifications via Microsoft Teams. The deployment includes sensors for environmental quality and AI models for occupancy detection, highlighting multidisciplinary collaboration and scalable solutions for data-driven decision-making.
